description_long: This is a rectangular decorative pillow with a soft, fabric exterior in a muted blue-green color. The front and back surfaces are adorned with a large, white, stylized floral design, likely resembling a daisy or similar flower, with delicate petal outlines and a subtle central detail. The pillow appears plush and well-stuffed, giving it a slightly rounded, inviting shape. The edges are smooth and the seams are not prominently visible, suggesting a high-quality finish. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on any side. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A soft, blue-green rectangular pillow with a large white floral design and a plush, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full white floral design on a blue-green background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the way the floral pattern wraps around the edge.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the floral design visible but slightly less centered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the pillow's pointed edge and the continuation of the floral pattern.
